calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Relief From Entry Of Judgment, Request For Settlement Agreement To Stand And For Dismissal Of This Action (Unlawful Detainer) Ccp 473
Off Calendar Oct-10-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
James M. Millar, 981-8100, appearing for defendant and moving party
Marina R. Franco of Wasserman Stern, 567-9600, appearing for plaintiff and responding party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT NICKLAUS KIM'S Motion For Relief From Entry Of Judgment, Request For Settlement Agreement To Stand And For Dismissal Of This Action (Unlawful Detainer) CCP 473 is denied. Defendant has not submitted responsive pleading as required by CCP 473 (b). Order signed in open Court. (301/PJB/PM) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189
